chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Pett. No.D-1550 of 2023 DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE Hearing of case (priority) 1. For orders on office objections at flag ‘A’ 2. For orders on CMA No.6544/2023 (S/A) 3. For hearing of main case 08.09.2025 Mr. Ali Raza Balouch, Additional Advocate General ************** Petitioners No. 1 and 5 have filed their statements for withdrawal of the present Constitution Petition on 03.09.2024, stating therein that their grievance has been addressed. However, as regards the remaining petitioners No.2 to 4, none is present nor any intimation has been received. It appears that Petitioners are not interested in pursuing the matter. Accordingly, the present Constitution Petition stands dismissed for non-prosecution along with pending application (s). J U D G E J U D G E M. Ali*
